notes: RC for v0.6.0 AI-native differentiation. Four AI operator workflow features delivered on main: AI call failure explanation (#233), AI route and change risk analysis (#234), AI recording/voicemail summary review (#235), and natural-language telecom reporting (#236). No DB schema changes in v0.6. Smoke gate passed on self-hosted FreeSWITCH runner. All CI checks green on RC commit.
helm_lint: Inherited from v0.5.0-rc.1 (run 26993419772). No Helm chart changes in v0.6. Expected: PASSED — 1 chart linted, 0 chart(s) failed.
docker_compose_prod_smoke: Inherited from v0.5.0 (enlogy@10.0.0.32). No docker-compose or API startup changes in v0.6. All v0.6 features are read-only advisory endpoints added on top of the existing API surface.

rotation_rehearsal.note: Inherited from v0.5.0. No auth middleware or token-handling changes in v0.6. JWT and runtime-token rotation paths are unchanged.

migrations: No new migrations in v0.6.0. v0.6 features read from existing call_events, recording_analysis_requests, and call_events tables only. Run `pnpm db:migrate` is a no-op upgrade from v0.5.0.
production_soak: Inherited from v0.3.0 (docs/ops/runtime-slo-evidence-2026-06-03.json). No call-path or hot-path changes in v0.6. All v0.6 changes affect AI advisory endpoints and read-only UI surfaces.
production_slo: Inherited from v0.3.0. No hot-path changes in v0.6.
carrier_interop: Inherited from v0.3.0 (docs/ops/carrier-interop-evidence-fusionpbx-2026-06-02.json). No carrier or call-path changes in v0.6.
security_review: CodeQL run 27028893173 clean. FreeSWITCH smoke 27028911635 passed. Coverage run 27028893142 passed. All v0.6 endpoints are read-only and capability-gated. No new privileged API surfaces. No raw SQL generation in NL reporting (parameterized filters only). No external AI/LLM calls (deterministic pattern matching).

v06_feature_evidence.issue_233_call_failure_explanation: POST /api/v1/calls/explain-failure. 23 unit tests + 6 integration tests. Capability: tenant.calls.explain_failure. Fails closed for unknown calls.
v06_feature_evidence.issue_234_route_risk_analysis: POST /api/v1/risk-analysis/route. 23 unit tests + 7 integration tests. Capability: tenant.risk_analysis.run. Advisory, no state mutation.
v06_feature_evidence.issue_235_summary_review: GET /recordings/:id/summary-review + /call-events/:id/summary-review. Transcript gated by compliance capability. Fail-closed for missing analysis.
v06_feature_evidence.issue_236_nl_reporting: POST /api/v1/reporting/nl-query. 27 unit tests + 5 integration tests. Capability: tenant.reporting.nl_query. No raw SQL.

rollback_plan: Roll back to v0.5.0 image. No DB rollback needed (no new migrations). Low risk — all v0.6 changes are additive read-only advisory endpoints.
known_gaps_before_production: Helm lint re-run on enlogy@10.0.0.32 with v0.6.0-rc.1 images (inherited pass from v0.5.0-rc.1; no chart changes)
docker-compose.prod.yml smoke with actual GHCR v0.6.0-rc.1 images (requires public packages or local tag)

operator_signoff.name: Fatih Kucukpetek
operator_signoff.notes: RC signoff for v0.6.0. All four v0.6 AI operator workflow features delivered and verified. All CI/smoke gates pass on RC commit. No DB migrations or call-path changes.
